## internal()

|                  |                  |
| ---------------- | ---------------- |
| Accepted values: | `yes`, `no` |
| Default:         | `no`           |

*Description:* Marks this source as an internal source. Internal sources carry messages generated by {{% param "product.abbrev" %}} itself (for example, the [`internal()` source]({{< relref "/chapter-sources/configuring-sources-internal/_index.md" >}})), rather than messages from external systems. Setting `internal(yes)` on a regular source is rarely needed and is intended for advanced configurations where you want messages produced by the source to be treated as if they originated from `syslog-ng` itself (for example, for routing or filtering purposes).
